ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Continued To Sep-17-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-21-2025 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO''s DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant the City and County of San Francisco (City)'s unopposed demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. The first amended complaint, filed on September 23, 2024, sues the City along with On Watch Global LLC and Walgreens. It purports to state a general negligence claim along with claims for gross negligence and intentional torts ("Stalking, Menacing, Assault" etc. (FAC at 3)). But the only fact it discloses is that "On 7/19/24, two Doe employees of defendant On Watch did willfully stalk, menace, assault, and attempt to assault with weapons, plaintiff Daniel Powell." (FAC at 3 para. 15 [the court has modified punctuation, spelling, and capitalizations to improve readability].) Nothing in this terse factual statement gives rise to any basis for holding the City liable. Plaintiff has filed no opposition, but the court reviewed his December 19, 2024 motion to strike the City's previous demurrer to discern whether Plaintiff is offering any explanation or facts he could assert on amendment. The court finds none. Accordingly the court denies leave to amend.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1- DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Off calendar. The court orders plaintiff immediately to meet and confer in compliance with CCP 430.41. Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by February 18, 2025.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)

MOTION TO STRIKE DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2- PLAINTIFF DANIEL POWELL'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Off calendar. Plaintiff failed to provide a declaration demonstrating a meet and confer in compliance with CCP 435.5.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)
